rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions in component type scopes when referring to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE.
Do not invent numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in requirements.
Omit unsafe Boolean comparisons unless the port is explicitly AGREE bool.
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not assume numeric bounds for ports without explicit requirement support.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Subcomponent port usage in component type contracts
